name: Mindwaster Skull
description: Notes Provides a whopping +120 HP and +40 MP on equip (the equivalent of a T5 HP ring), the highest of any skull. The summon does a solid amount of damage and has a nice heal compared to other UT skulls, while still having the ability to cast Vampire Burst.
effects: Necromancy: raise 1 Mindwaster Undead to fight for you.
Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
